# 📁 External Data

This folder contains datasets collected from external sources such as Kaggle, APIs, and public datasets.

## 📂 Contents
- CSV files: structured datasets
- JSON files: API-based data
- Metadata: dataset descriptions and licenses

## ⚠️ Disclaimer
- Data belongs to original sources
- Used for research and development only

## 🔄 Usage
External data is integrated into the pipeline and processed before training models.
